prompt: Create a vertical fantasy fashion editorial portrait of a graceful young woman dancing in the center of a whirlwind of torn silk ribbons and floral fabric panels. She wears an elaborate black couture dress with a deep V neckline, petal-like shoulder details, gold vein embroidery, and long flowing strips that merge into the surrounding ribbons. Her arms are raised elegantly above her head in a ballet-like pose, wrists adorned with delicate bracelets, fingers poised as if conducting the swirling fabric. Her hair is a dark romantic updo with small pink blossoms tucked into it; keep the face softly obscured or anonymous rather than detailed. Surround her with exactly 18 major visible flowing fabric ribbons: 6 deep black/navy ribbons, 4 hot pink ribbons, 3 cream parchment ribbons, 2 floral-patterned ribbons, 1 teal-blue ribbon, 1 gold-brown ribbon, and 1 pale lavender ribbon. Fill the scene with abundant peonies, cherry blossoms, and small wildflowers in pink, coral, cream, and magenta, integrated into the ribbons and background like a collage. Use dramatic upward swirling motion, layered fabric depth, warm backlight glowing behind the dancer, high-detail textile textures, painterly photorealism, ornate Japanese-inspired floral patterns, cinematic lighting, rich contrast, and a dreamy maximalist haute-couture atmosphere. Canvas is a tall 9:16 portrait composition, full body visible from head to flowing dress hem, no text, no watermark, no extra people.
